archetype: Elegant Islamic (Custom variation of Organic & Earthy + Jewel & Luxury)

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-heading tracking-tight text-primary
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-heading tracking-tight text-primary
hierarchy.arabic_text: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-arabic leading-loose text-primary text-center

hero.layout: min-h-[100svh] flex flex-col items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden
hero.background: Use `islamic_hero_bg` as an absolute background layer with a subtle white/cream gradient overlay (bg-white/80) to ensure text readability.
hero.image_style: The portrait (`pilgrim_couple_portrait`) should be framed in an Islamic arch shape (using Tailwind `rounded-t-[10rem] rounded-b-xl`) with a thin gold border.

event_details.layout: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center max-w-6xl mx-auto
event_details.cards: Solid cream background (bg-[#F5F2E9]) with subtle emerald shadows and gold border accents.
event_details.map: Embed Google Map with rounded-3xl overflow-hidden and grayscale/sepia CSS filter to match elegant theme.

rundown_timeline.style: Vertical timeline. Use a central gold line (`bg-secondary/30`) with gold dots for each event. Content alternating left/right on desktop.
rundown_timeline.item_style: p-6 bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-sm border border-gold_light/50

gallery.style: Swiper slider. Images should have varied heights or arch masks (`rounded-t-[5rem]`) to look like a gallery wall, not a basic square grid.

wishes_form.layout: max-w-2xl mx-auto bg-primary text-primary-foreground p-8 md:p-12 rounded-[2.5rem] relative overflow-hidden
wishes_form.style: Use `islamic_pattern_cream` with opacity-10 mixed into the background. Inputs should be translucent (bg-white/10) with white text and gold borders on focus.

music_toggle.style: w-12 h-12 bg-white rounded-full shadow-xl text-primary flex items-center justify-center border border-gold_light cursor-pointer transition-transform hover:scale-110

motion.scroll_reveal: Use Framer Motion `initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 30 }}` `whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}` with `viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }}` for all major sections.
motion.hover_effects: Subtle scale up (hover:scale-105) for gallery images and buttons.
motion.parallax: Apply subtle parallax (e.g., y-axis translation based on scroll) to background patterns.

islamic_hero_bg.description: Abstract elegant emerald and gold Kaaba/mosque background.

pilgrim_couple_portrait.description: Portrait of Indonesian Muslim couple for the hero section.

islamic_pattern_cream.description: Subtle cream/gold geometric pattern for verse and rundown backgrounds.

gallery_2_kaaba_door.description: Pilgrims at the golden Kaaba door.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette: Emerald Green (#0A4C36) and Gold (#D4AF37) with Cream backgrounds.
Use Playfair Display for headings and Poppins for body text.
Implement an arch-shaped mask (`rounded-t-[10rem]`) for the main portrait image in the hero section.
Add a fixed 'Music Toggle' button at the bottom right. Use a simple HTML Audio element (hidden) that plays a soft Islamic nasheed/instrumental on click.
Do NOT build a database connection for the Wishes form. Only build the UI that simulates a success state on submit.
Use standard Tailwind classes for shadows and borders, enhancing the elegant Islamic feel.
